global_description: Small, round beetle with a dome-shaped body, bright red or orange elytra with black spots, shiny and smooth texture, black head with white markings, and short black legs.

part_details.elytra: Bright red or orange with distinct black spots, smooth and shiny
part_details.head: Small, black with white markings near the eyes

spatial_relations: Elytra cover the back of the body
